description: This file defines a ConnectionManager class used to manage WebSocket connections for a game room in a real-time application, likely part of a websocket backend for a chess platform.

classes.name: ConnectionManager
classes.description: Manages WebSocket connections grouped by game_id (room), allowing clients to connect, disconnect, and broadcast messages to all clients in the same room.

methods.name: None __init__(self)
methods.description: Initializes the ConnectionManager with an asyncio lock and a dictionary to manage rooms.

methods.name: None connect(self, game_id: str, websocket: WebSocket)
methods.description: Accepts a WebSocket connection and adds it to the specified game room.

methods.name: None disconnect(self, game_id: str, websocket: WebSocket)
methods.description: Removes a WebSocket from the specified game room, cleaning up if the room becomes empty.

methods.name: None broadcast(self, game_id: str, message: Dict[str, Any])
methods.description: Sends a JSON message to all WebSocket clients connected in the specified game room.

ctags.name: broadcast
ctags.pattern: /^    async def broadcast(self, game_id: str, message: Dict[str, Any]) -> None:$/

ctags.name: connect
ctags.pattern: /^    async def connect(self, game_id: str, websocket: WebSocket) -> None:$/

ctags.name: disconnect
ctags.pattern: /^    async def disconnect(self, game_id: str, websocket: WebSocket) -> None:$/
